text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Today's result would be acceptable to most, but
not to me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Second or third is not enough. I must inspire awe
in all who see me run.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Any less, and I shall never realize my dream.
choice_data_list:
Well, I know how hard you tried. Good job
today.

Next time we'll show them how the Emperor
races.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Yes, I did. Thank you. I apologize if I've gotten
ahead of myself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If I am falling short, there is nothing for it but to
work harder. Today, I recover my strength.
Tomorrow, I resume my training!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
An Emperor stands above the rest and leads from
the front.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Forward I must march, and I will not stop until I
reach my goal!
